programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: A video shared in the Furry community by a person named "Monster" causes a new level of vigilante detective work; clues lead to a remote shipping container in the outback of Australia owned by a well-respected celebrity.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: When Patch O'Furr is tagged in a mysterious online post, he must face the fact that animal abusers are hiding in plain sight in the Furry Fandom; Furry Detectives comb through evidence and discover one popular Youtuber is a suspect.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: An online 3D printing group leads to a break in the case and The Furry Detectives get their first arrest; the Zoosadist ringleader, known as SnakeThing, is still out there.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: It wasn't just animals, he was hurting people too; the self-proclaimed Furvengers must battle through legal obstacles and personal attacks as they hunt for SnakeThing.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: A video shared in the Furry community by a person named "Monster" causes a new level of vigilante detective work; clues lead to a remote shipping container in the outback of Australia owned by a well-respected celebrity.

programme.title: Dating Death
programme.desc: Rodney Alcala flees Los Angeles in 1968 after the rape and attempted murder of an 8-year-old girl, but after moving to New York under an assumed name, he begins working at a New Hampshire arts camp for children.

programme.title: Dating Death
programme.desc: After his early release in 1974 from prison, Rodney Alcala's victim count continues to rise as he uses his photography skills to prey on both young women and children.

programme.title: Dating Death
programme.desc: In 1979 on Huntington Beach, Calif., a girl goes missing and is later found dead in a wooded area; the only lead is a sketch composite that resembles Alcala.

programme.title: Dating Death
programme.desc: Rodney Alcala flees Los Angeles in 1968 after the rape and attempted murder of an 8-year-old girl, but after moving to New York under an assumed name, he begins working at a New Hampshire arts camp for children.

programme.title: Dating Death
programme.desc: After his early release in 1974 from prison, Rodney Alcala's victim count continues to rise as he uses his photography skills to prey on both young women and children.

programme.title: Dating Death
programme.desc: In 1979 on Huntington Beach, Calif., a girl goes missing and is later found dead in a wooded area; the only lead is a sketch composite that resembles Alcala.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Young Eli learns to live among the Comanches; Eli and Pete clash over a response to an attack on their home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Young Eli trains as a warrior, but makes enemies; Eli and Phineas struggle to help the family in Austin; Pete faces his demons.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Young Eli faces a test of survival; the McCulloughs enact a dangerous plan to take the fight to their enemy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: An enemy forces Young Eli to question his loyalties; the McCulloughs' past comes back to haunt them, with deadly results.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Young Eli makes a choice with dangerous consequences; the McCulloughs deal with a tragedy; Jeannie wants to save the family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Young Eli must navigate tribal politics; a crisis forces Pete and Sally into a decision that will change the family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Prairie Flower is torn between love and duty; Pete grows closer to Maria; Eli brings Phineas in on a dangerous secret.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Young Eli must trust a strange ally to survive; Eli's past guides him to a choice that puts him and Phineas at odds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: The tribe faces an unexpected return; Eli's plan for the future forces Pete into a life-or-death decision about his loyalties.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Eli McCullough survives a Comanche attack in 1849, and in 1915, leads his family's empire through difficult times.

programme.title: Comic Book Men
programme.desc: A fan sells a Mr. T backyard water game; Ming is inspired to have fun on a hot day; Walt risks the shop's street credibility.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Desperate to relinquish Lasher, Rowan reaches out to her extended Mayfair family for help; Rowan must trust their unique process, a sacred ritual; Sip's search for answers takes him back to the Talamasca.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan makes a shocking discovery but has to deal with it alone; a tragic event brings Rowan closer to the Mayfairs -- and Lasher; Sip falls deeper down the rabbit hole of the key necklace.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan inadvertently discovers her role in a prophecy that's held the Mayfair family for generations; Sip's investigation reaches its conclusion, uncovering secrets that could tarnish both Rowan's family and his role in the Talamasca.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Neurosurgeon Rowan Fielding has a problem -- when she gets mad, she kills with her mind; her search for answers sends her toward her secretive biological family; in New Orleans, Deirdre Mayfair is desperate to escape from her aunt's oppressive house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Wracked with grief over Ellie's death, Rowan is out of control and unfit to perform surgeries; her paranoia that someone is following her is proven true; in New Orleans, Deirdre and her mysterious companion Lasher work together to draw Rowan home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Deirdre's grisly death, Rowan searches for safety in a strange city; Sip provides Rowan with a safe house while he investigates Deirdre's murder; Lasher makes contact with Rowan, but not in the way one might expect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: At Deirdre's funeral, Rowan is plunged into the world of the infamous Mayfair family; Uncle Cortland and Aunt Carlotta present diverging views on Lasher; Rowan must choose whom to trust and face the dire consequences; Sip identifies Deirdre's killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Trapped in the First Street House, Rowan and Sip must confront its many mysteries in order to escape; Rowan grapples with an inconceivable offer; Sip's sister Odette makes a horrifying discovery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Desperate to relinquish Lasher, Rowan reaches out to her extended Mayfair family for help; Rowan must trust their unique process, a sacred ritual; Sip's search for answers takes him back to the Talamasca.
